Pilot Shop · Watches · Garmin

From the workbench — new arrival

Garmin D2™ Mach 1 Pro, 51 mm Titanium

Garmin's flagship aviator smartwatch in vented titanium — AMOLED display, 25-day battery, ECG, and a full panel of pilot tools on the wrist.

By the RWAS Pilot Shop Desk ◆ From ◆ SKU 010-02804-80
Price
$1,399.00
Check stock with RWAS before ordering
Garmin List Price Sold at MAP — no markup, no markdown.
Confirm stock first
Garmin items are ordered to your request — RWAS does not hold Garmin stock. Call (605) 299-8178 or message us to confirm availability and lead time before placing an order.

The D2 Mach 1 Pro is what happens when Garmin stops thinking of a pilot watch as a watch and starts thinking of it as a backup panel that you happen to wear. The 51 mm Pro elevates the line with a vented titanium bracelet, sapphire crystal, and an LED flashlight bright enough to find a sectional dropped behind the seat at night.

Inside, you get the full Garmin aviation toolkit: direct-to navigation, NEXRAD over Connect IQ, runway proximity alerts, a baro altimeter, and a Pulse Ox check before you climb to 14,000. On the ground, it earns its keep as a daily smartwatch — AMOLED at 1.4″, sleep, training readiness, ECG, and 25 days of battery in smartwatch mode.

If you spend any time night-current or doing red-eye Part 91 trips, the Red Shift Mode alone is worth the upgrade — the entire UI shifts to dark red so it doesn't shred your night vision the way every other smartwatch does.

“A backup panel you happen to wear — that's the honest one-line on the Mach 1 Pro.”
— from the workbench
Order & fulfillment Ordered direct from Garmin to your build — we do not hold Garmin stock at KYKN.
Check with RWAS for stock before ordering. Typical lead time: 2–5 business days from confirmation.
Warranty & service Full Garmin warranty — warranty service performed in-house at our Part 145 repair station, not shipped out.
Talk to a pilot Call (605) 299-8178 — staffed by pilots and A&Ps, not a call center.

Specifications

Case size51 mm
Bezel materialTitanium
LensSapphire crystal
DisplayAMOLED, 1.4″ (35.56 mm)
Resolution454 × 454
BraceletVented titanium — quick-release
Battery (smartwatch)Up to 25 days
Battery (Fly+GPS+SpO₂)Up to 46 hours
SensorsHR, SpO₂, ECG, baro alt., compass, gyro, accel., thermometer
Water rating10 ATM
ConnectivityBluetooth, Wi-Fi, ANT+
Aviation toolsDirect-to, NEXRAD via IQ, runway alerts, METAR, Pulse Ox
Weight106 g (with bracelet)
Box contentsWatch, charging cable, documentation
